reasoning:
(true, stronger, Extra Conclusion)

Mathlib's `IsTopologicalBasis` includes the condition `eq_generateFrom : ‹TopologicalSpace α› =
generateFrom T`, which (since ℝ carries the standard Euclidean topology by default) additionally
asserts that T generates the Euclidean topology.

The informal statement only asks:
  (1) T satisfies the basis axioms (covering + intersection refinement), and
  (2) the topology generated by T differs from the lower limit topology.
